---
title: "Check Your Understanding"
format: html
toc: false
---

## Quiz

<form id="quiz">

<!-- Q1 -->

<p><strong>1) Which statement best defines an OER?</strong><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q1" value="A"> A) Free to access but not editable</label><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q1" value="B"> B) Copyrighted material for teaching</label><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q1" value="C"> C) Any online learning material</label><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q1" value="D" data-correct="true"> D) Licensed for reuse and adaptation</label></p>

<!-- Q2 -->

<p><strong>2) Which licence allows adaptation and commercial reuse?</strong><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q2" value="A"> A) CC BY ND</label><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q2" value="B" data-correct="true"> B) CC BY</label><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q2" value="C"> C) CC BY NC</label><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q2" value="D"> D) All CC licences</label></p>

<!-- Q3 -->

<p><strong>3) Which of the following is a hidden barrier to OER reuse?</strong><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q3" value="A" data-correct="true"> A) Sharing materials in proprietary formats</label><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q3" value="B"> B) Providing editable source files</label><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q3" value="C"> C) Using a CC BY licence</label><br> <label><input type="radio" name="q3" value="D"> D) Publishing in an open repository</label></p>

<!-- Hyperlinked controls -->

<p><a href="#" id="submit-link">✔️ Submit</a>  </p>

</form>

<!-- Result area -->

::: {#result style="font-weight: bold; margin-top: 1em;"}
:::

```{=html}
<script>
document.getElementById("submit-link").addEventListener("click", function (e) {
  e.preventDefault();

  const form = document.getElementById("quiz");
  const correct = form.querySelectorAll('input[data-correct="true"]:checked').length;
  const total = 3;

  const result = document.getElementById("result");
  const indexLink = document.getElementById("index-link");
  const backLink = document.getElementById("back-link");

  let message = `You scored ${correct}/${total}. `;

  if (correct >= 2) {
    message += "Well done!";
    indexLink.style.display = "block";
    backLink.style.display = "none";
  } else {
    message += "You might want to go back and look at sections of the Introduction to OERs unit.";
    indexLink.style.display = "none";
    backLink.style.display = "block";
  }

  result.textContent = message;
});
</script>
```

::: {#index-link style="display: none; margin-top: 1.5em; text-align: center;"}
<a href="/index.html"> <img src="images/clipboard-3722003544.png" alt="Return to programme home page" width="50"/> </a>
:::

::: {#back-link style="display: none; margin-top: 1.5em; text-align: center;"}
<a href="/Introduction to OERs/Intro-Learning Outcomes.html"> <img src="images/clipboard-372805318.png" alt="Return to the beginning of the unit" width="50"/> </a>
:::
